apps.name: YouTube+
apps.versionDescription: YouTube Plus built with YTLite v5.2b3 plus YouPiP, RYD, YouQuality, YTVideoOverlay, DontEatMyContent. (YTUHD disabled in this build.)
apps.localizedDescription: Enhanced YouTube iOS client: ad blocking, Picture-in-Picture, Return YouTube Dislikes, quality selection, and more. Built from the dayanch96/YTLite project via Jake's YTLite_v5.2b4 fork. Rebuilt periodically as decrypted IPAs refresh.
